title: Build pipeline fault injection, comparison oracles, and security tests
description: Fault injection F1-F5 (matcher panic, registry freeze, malformed Aho-Corasick, concurrent stress, nil/zero inputs). Comparison oracles O1-O3 (policy exhaustive, glob reference, env upstream). Security SEC1-SEC3 (glob injection, allowlist bypass, regex DoS).

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete: commit 6a8d390. Oracles O2-O3 and security SEC1-SEC3. Note: F1-F5 already exist in pipeline_test.go, registry_test.go, and prefilter_test.go from qck.3/qck.7/qck.8. O1 already exists in policy_test.go. All pass with -race.
